title: fix(deps): update dependency instantsearch.js to v3.6.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [instantsearch.js](https://community.algolia.com/instantsearch.js/) ([source](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js)) | dependencies | minor | [`3.5.4` -> `3.6.0`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/instantsearch.js/3.5.4/3.6.0) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>algolia/instantsearch.js</summary>

### [`v3.6.0`](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​360httpsgithubcomalgoliainstantsearchjscomparev354v360-2019-07-30)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v3.5.4...v3.6.0)

##### Bug Fixes

-   **clearRefinements:** reset page to 0 ([#​3936](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/3936)) ([7378a0a](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/7378a0a))
-   pass noop as default value to unmountFn at connectors ([#​3955](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/3955)) ([7c38744](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/7c38744))
-   **enhanceConfiguration:** deduplicate the hierarchicalFacets ([#​3966](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/3966)) ([baf8a35](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/baf8a35))
-   **hierarchicalFacets:** prevent different rootPath on same attribute ([#​3965](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/3965)) ([5ee79fa](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/5ee79fa))
-   **menuSelect:** unmount component ([#​3911](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/3911)) ([f6debce](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/f6debce))
-   **rangeInput:** unmount component ([#​3910](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/3910)) ([f6c29e8](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/f6c29e8))
-   **refinementList:** fix showMore button to work after search ([#​3082](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/3082)) ([23e46b6](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/23e46b6))

#### [3.5.4](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v3.5.3...v3.5.4) (2019-07-01)

##### Bug Fixes

-   **connectSortBy:** do not throw with wrong indexes ([#​3824](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/3824)) ([2a84ee2](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/2a84ee2))
-   **deps:** update dependency instantsearch.js to v3.5.3 ([#​3877](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/3877)) ([463f3bb](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/463f3bb))
-   **escape:** make sure that \_\_escaped does not get removed ([#​3830](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/3830)) ([fbafd22](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/fbafd22))
-   **getRefinements:** check for facet before accessing its data ([#​3842](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/3842)) ([aadc769](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/aadc769))
-   **panel:** return value from dispose ([#​3895](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/3895)) ([bceb78f](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/bceb78f))
-   **voiceSearch:** remove event listeners on stop ([#​3845](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/3845)) ([688e36a](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/688e36a))

#### [3.5.3](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v3.5.1...v3.5.3) (2019-05-28)

##### Bug Fixes

-   **voiceSearch:** let the connector handle the default value of searchAsYouSpeak when it's not given ([#​3817](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/3817)) ([9d3e91b](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/9d3e91b))
-   **getTag:** use object version of toString ([#​3820](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/3820)) ([a7348ea](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/a7348ea))
-   **types:** fix cssClasses of voiceSearch ([#​3783](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/3783)) ([f016326](https://togithub.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/f016326))

</details>
